config.remote_control.disabled_desc: Enable to manage remote devices via lightweight agent binaries that connect to this AuraGo instance.
config.remote_control.read_only_label: Read-Only Mode (blocks file writes, deletions and shell commands on all devices)
config.remote_control.network_desc: Configure how remote clients discover and connect to this supervisor.
config.remote_control.security_desc: Control device enrollment and audit logging.
config.remote_control.auto_approve_label: Auto-approve new devices (⚠️ only on trusted networks)
config.remote_control.limits_desc: Set resource constraints for remote operations.
config.remote_control.devices_desc: Live status of enrolled remote devices.
